appearance.themeSystemHint: System follows your OS-level light/dark preference.
appearance.soundOnCompleteHint: Play a soft chime when a run finishes.
appearance.titleAnimationHint: Show animated terminal title in the CLI.
appearance.languageHint: Changes only the interface text. Prompts, skills, and model output are not affected.

connection.wsUrlHint: URL of the agent WebSocket server. The server runs alongside the CLI.
